titleStmt.title: SII 19.72: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 72. (A.R. No. 33 of 1931.) TIRUKKŌḌIKĀVAL, KUMBHAKONAM TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT. ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE, TIRUKKŌṬĪŚVARA TEMPLE.

summary.p: This is stated to be a copy of an old stone inscription engraved on a loose slab, which was now consequently of no use and hence cancelled. It registers a gift of 96 sheep made by one Vēmbaṉ Kaliyōṭṭi of Pādūr in Iruṅgōḷappāḍi, during the management of Pichchadēvar for burning a perpetual lamp in the temple of Mahādēva at Tirukkōḍikāval in Nallāṟṟūr-nāḍu on the northern bank of the river.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . Ituvum moru paḻaṅkaṟpaṭi . kopparakecaripanmaṟkku yāṇṭu 3 Āvatu vaṭakarai nallāṟṟūrnāṭṭu tirukko
ṭikāvil mahādevaṟkku piccatevar Ārācciyil Iruṅkoḷappāṭi pātūruṭaiyāṉ ve mpaṉ kaliyoṭṭi vaiytta non=tāviḷakku 1- kkum vaitta Āṭu toṇṇūṟṟuāṟu ca(n)ntrātittaval Itu paḻaṅkaṟpaṭi I(n)n=ta śrīvimāṉattile Eṟa veṭṭiṉamaiyil muṉṉivājakam veṭṭikkiṭanta taṉikkallāl Ubhaiyokam Illā(m)maiyil Atu tavirntatu paṉmāyeśvarar paṭaikkuṭṭa peṟṟār .
Digital edition of SII 19.72 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
